behavior_summary: Provides the 'U8P_EWSHELF::look' (examine) handler for a shelf object. When the player examines the shelf this script displays a single short descriptive text: "shelf ".

After displaying the text the process suspends (the code contains a trailing suspend), so the U8P_EWSHELF::look process yields/waits after the bark — likely to allow player acknowledgement or to return control to the engine.
There is no branching, menu interaction, item manipulation, or global flag access; the handler is a minimal read-only description response.
notable_control_flow: U8P_EWSHELF::look executes linearly: emit a Bark with text "shelf ", then hit a suspend node (pause/terminate the U8P_EWSHELF::look process).
No conditional branches, no menu/Ask nodes, and no calls to external systems are present in the process.
The presence of an opening block/Unknown node and a trailing suspend/Unknown node suggests a simple start/display/wait lifecycle for the U8P_EWSHELF::look process.
open_questions: Is the trailing space in the bark text "shelf " intentional (formatting/concatenation with other text) or an artifact of extraction?
Does U8P_EWSHELF::look also get invoked by a fast-area entry (enterFastArea) in some contexts, or only by an explicit player 'U8P_EWSHELF::look' action?
Does the suspend node represent a temporary pause waiting for player input, or does it indicate the process ends immediately after the bark (engine-dependent behavior)?

main_function.name: U8P_EWSHELF::look
main_function.purpose: Respond to the player's examine/U8P_EWSHELF::look action for the shelf by showing a short descriptive text and yielding the U8P_EWSHELF::look process.
entry_conditions: Invoked when the player examines or 'looks at' the shelf (U8P_EWSHELF::look/inspect action).
May also be invoked by engine U8P_EWSHELF::look-type fast-area/trigger entry in contexts where U8P_EWSHELF::look processes are started automatically (inferred).

function_map.name: U8P_EWSHELF::look
function_map.role: show short description for the shelf and suspend the U8P_EWSHELF::look process
